## Problem statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Use case

How would this feature be used? Provide an example scenario.

```
# Example command or interaction
"Tell the AI-CEO to ..."
```

## Scope

Which part of the framework does this affect?

- [ ] Orchestrator (CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] Agent (specify which)
- [ ] Skill (specify which)
- [ ] Steering file
- [ ] Setup script
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
